title: Lost Ark

notes:
When loading EAC(EasyAntiCheat), a request is made to

https:// modules-cdn.eac-prod.on.epicgames.com/modules/{productid}/{deploymentid}/{win64 or linux64}

For Lost Ark this would be:

https://modules-cdn.eac-prod.on.epicgames.com/modules/5de28b783f9a47a1a1f88bca7b1256ef/08600440b54c42239b82a79131ad866d/linux64

You can see for yourself it gets denied


However, checking Throne and Liberty for example(which runs on Linux):

https://modules-cdn.eac-prod.on.epicgames.com/modules/58dec5a58e8f4ce6beca223311f65b4c/78750d38d11e4fc79c6fec713d002391/linux64

You can see that it works and it opens a download dialog


The log result is

[Windows] [EAC Launcher] [Warn] Could not reach the Easy Anti-Cheat CDN, launching with null client, result code: 506.

In-game this results in an error popup around a minute after selecting a server which will close the game:

"Cannot connect to the server. Exiting the game. [EAC Offline - Anti-cheat client protection not active (NullClient)]
title: Lost Ark
